title: Link from one board to a filtered list on another board

posts.author: Charlie00TJ (Charlie Nowak)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have an Accounts board with information specific to that location.
I have another board with Customer contacts.
The Accounts board and Customer Contacts board are linked. In the customer contacts board each customer contact is associated with an account via a mirrored column.

Is there a way to create a column, list of subitems, or link, in the Accounts board that would open view to Customer contacts that would be filtered to only show customer contacts assigned to the the selected Account? I tried to use Concatenate formula to build a URL in a Formula column. It worked, but the link was not clickable.
